---
title: "Social Justice Theories in Education"
---

**Globed master \| 2023-2024**

# General information

-   [Syllabus](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1OM2PQdQA5fzh9oLR2eYdAVrQTLZoc-NE/view?usp=sharing)

## Assignments

### Assignment 1 \| Blog post

-   [Assignment guidelines](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1cu3_w-h-o7r-BSWwc9Li_1fMDB1JNbG4/view?usp=sharing)

-   [Assessment rubric](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fwCrC-A7wIXxGwYcUp_PGxkYiFj-g1HZ/view?usp=sharing)

-   **Blog post examples:** [Example 1](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fnbKyLnp52Q20TuSjkOrObz5h90J-jOg/view?usp=sharing) \| [Example 2](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fIU6uvWb_DE5T0jZaoE4xfR_UqwTiHcO/view?usp=sharing) \| [Example 3](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fpB-YAAISbZNvrkqrMPQfwUS4zOPacm8/view?usp=sharing) \| [Example 4](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fZil-IHDPWsi7YF7PZpsLdcRNR0pTuhF/view?usp=sharing) \| [Example 5](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fM-StPSWYFVxzhyS6iz3KIE6AxOH9-mr/view?usp=sharing)

# Session 1 \| Introduction to the course + What is social justice?

In the first part of the session, the students will be provided with an overview of the course contents and the assessment policies. In the second part, we will discuss the fundamentals of social justice as a key topic of political sociology and its relevance in education.

-   [Slides \| Session 1](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1yRIH5-9RHxe_JP1nYiN_5GvXR8pjuUJN/view?usp=sharing)

# Session 2 \| Distributive justice

In this session, we will discuss the most relevant concepts and theories about distributive justice. We will also explore their applications to education and the different conceptualisations of the distribuendum in education. Moreover, we will briefly examine the capabilities theory of justice as an alternative to Rawlsian approaches. Finally, we will examine the implications of distributive justice theories in conceptualising educational equity.

-   Slides \| Session 2
